videoSnippet.title: The 2900 Winning Move || Lê Quang Liêm vs Yağız Kaan Erdoğmuş || Biel Chess Festival 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Le, Quang Liem (2731) - Erdogmus, Yagiz Kaan (2713)
Biel Chess Festival 2026 (Chess.com) [23] 2026.07.21
A40 Queen's pawn, Franco-Indian (Keres) defence

1.d4 e6 2.c4 Bb4+ 3.Bd2 Bxd2+ 4.Qxd2 Nf6 5.g3 O-O 6.Bg2 d5 7.Nf3 c6 8.Qc2 Nbd7 9.O-O b6 10.Nbd2 Bb7 11.b4 a5 12.a3 dxc4 13.Nxc4 axb4 14.axb4 c5 15.dxc5 bxc5 16.b5 Bd5 17.Nfd2 Rxa1 18.Rxa1 Nb6 19.Nxb6 Bxg2 20.Qxc5 Qxd2 21.Kxg2 Qxe2 22.Qc4 Qe5 23.Ra8 Rxa8 24.Nxa8 Kf8 25.b6 Ke7 26.b7 Nd7 27.Nc7 Qd6 28.Na6 Qb6 29.Qc8 Qd6 30.Nc7 Qc6+ 31.Kg1 Qc1+ 32.Kg2 Qc6+ 33.Kh3 Qb6 34.f3 Qc5 35.Na6 Qf5+ 36.Kg2 Qd3 37.b8=Q Qd2+ 38.Kh3 Qh6+ 39.Kg2 Qd2+ 40.Kh3 Qh6+ 41.Kg2

0:01 Hello Everyone!
